modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about the appearance of additional tabs in Word

full_description_text:  
The user is seeking information regarding the additional tabs in Word. They want to know when these tabs will become available. This inquiry suggests a need for clarity on upcoming features or updates in the application. The user is likely anticipating enhancements to their experience with Word.
